Precondition: box_1 is on top of box_2 and both end-effectors are free.
Postcondition: box_1 is grasped by both the left and right end-effectors.

Precondition: box_1 is held by both end-effectors and the area behind box_2 is reachable.
Postcondition: box_1 is placed behind box_2 and both end-effectors are free.

Precondition: box_2 is accessible and both end-effectors are free.
Postcondition: box_2 is grasped by both the left and right end-effectors.
